title: Unofficial MTR Let's Play
description: The modpack for the MLPC server, based around the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
This is a modpack for the Unofficial MTR Let's Play server (MLPC) that is based around the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod.


<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

The modpack includes the 51 mods shown here:

- Admiral
- Adorn
- Amendments
- AntiGhost
- AppleSkin
- Architectury
- Axiom
- Capes
- Chipped
- Chunks Fade In
- Chunky
- CIT Resewn
- Continuity
- CoroUtil
- CrabMTR Transit+
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Eating Animation
- EMI
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- Essential
- Essential Commands
- Essential Commands Core
- Euphoria Patcher
- FerriteCore
- GeckoLib 4
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Iris
- Jesse's Transit Addon
- Joban Client Mod
- Lithium
- Minecraft Transit Railway
- Mod Menu
- Naturalist
- Nemo's Transit Expansion
- Pal
- ReFramed
- Resourceful Lib
- Simple Voice Chat
- Simple Voice Chat Enhanced Groups
- Slide Show
- Sodium
  - Reese's Sodium Options
  - Sodium Extra
- Starlight
- Supplementaries
- Vein Mining
- What Are They Up To
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map

</details>



> NOTE: This pack is **NOT** designed for the *Official* Minecraft Transit Railway server.
